query: Calculate percent change in conversion rate between test and control groups
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | PercentChange(
    condition_column='experiment_group',
    baseline='control',
    output_name='conversion_lift'
)

query: Compute percentage lift in click-through rate for each variant compared to control
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | PercentChange(
    condition_column='variant',
    baseline='control',
    output_name='ctr_lift'
)

query: Find percent difference in average order value between the two pricing strategies
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | PercentChange(
    condition_column='pricing_strategy',
    baseline='strategy_a',
    output_name='aov_percent_diff'
)

query: Calculate percentage improvement in engagement metrics for the new UI version
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | PercentChange(
    condition_column='ui_version',
    baseline='old_version',
    output_name='engagement_improvement'
)

query: Measure percent change in retention rates between user cohorts
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | PercentChange(
    condition_column='user_cohort',
    baseline='cohort_2023_q1',
    output_name='retention_change'
)

query: Measure absolute difference in customer satisfaction scores after product update
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | AbsoluteChange(
    condition_column='version',
    baseline='before_update',
    output_name='satisfaction_change'
)

query: Calculate absolute increase in conversion rate for each landing page variant
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | AbsoluteChange(
    condition_column='landing_page_variant',
    baseline='original',
    output_name='conv_rate_increase'
)

query: Find absolute change in average session duration between mobile and desktop users
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | AbsoluteChange(
    condition_column='device_type',
    baseline='desktop',
    output_name='session_duration_diff'
)

query: Calculate raw difference in add-to-cart rates between the new and old product pages
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | AbsoluteChange(
    condition_column='page_version',
    baseline='old_page',
    output_name='atc_diff'
)

query: Measure the absolute change in user engagement score after the feature release
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | AbsoluteChange(
    condition_column='release_stage',
    baseline='pre_release',
    output_name='engagement_delta'
)

query: Compare click-through rates between variants stratified by user device type
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | MH(
    condition_column='variant',
    baseline='control',
    stratified_by='device_type',
    output_name='stratified_ctr_comparison'
)

query: Use Mantel-Haenszel estimator to compare conversion rates stratified by age group
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | MH(
    condition_column='experiment_group',
    baseline='control',
    stratified_by='age_group',
    output_name='mh_conversion_estimate'
)

query: Apply MH method to analyze purchase rates between groups stratified by gender
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | MH(
    condition_column='group',
    baseline='group_a',
    stratified_by='gender',
    output_name='mh_purchase_rate_analysis'
)

query: Calculate stratified comparison of retention rates by country and subscription tier
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | MH(
    condition_column='product_variant',
    baseline='variant_a',
    stratified_by=['country', 'subscription_tier'],
    output_name='stratified_retention_comparison'
)

query: Use Mantel-Haenszel to compare bounce rates between website versions stratified by traffic source
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | MH(
    condition_column='website_version',
    baseline='current',
    stratified_by='traffic_source',
    output_name='stratified_bounce_comparison'
)

query: Adjust conversion metrics using pre-experiment user activity as covariate
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | CUPED(
    condition_column='test_group',
    baseline='control',
    covariates=['pre_test_conversion_rate', 'user_tenure'],
    stratified_by='country',
    output_name='adjusted_conversion_impact'
)

query: Apply CUPED adjustment to revenue metrics using historical spending as covariate
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | CUPED(
    condition_column='experiment_group',
    baseline='control',
    covariates=['historical_revenue', 'purchase_frequency'],
    output_name='variance_reduced_revenue'
)

query: Use CUPED technique to reduce variance in engagement metrics between test groups
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | CUPED(
    condition_column='test_variant',
    baseline='control',
    covariates=['pre_test_engagement', 'account_age', 'session_frequency'],
    output_name='adjusted_engagement_comparison'
)

query: Apply variance reduction to click-through rate analysis using pre-experiment data
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | CUPED(
    condition_column='email_variant',
    baseline='standard_template',
    covariates=['historical_ctr', 'email_engagement_score'],
    stratified_by='user_segment',
    output_name='adjusted_ctr_analysis'
)

query: Use CUPED to analyze subscription upgrade rates controlling for account tenure
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | CUPED(
    condition_column='feature_flag',
    baseline='off',
    covariates=['account_age', 'feature_usage_count', 'previous_upgrade_attempts'],
    output_name='adjusted_upgrade_analysis'
)

query: Calculate percent change in purchase rates adjusted by historical purchase behavior
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | PrePostChange(
    condition_column='test_variant',
    baseline='control',
    covariates=['pre_test_purchase_rate', 'user_activity_score'],
    output_name='adjusted_purchase_lift'
)

query: Use pre/post adjustment to measure impact on conversion rates accounting for seasonal trends
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | PrePostChange(
    condition_column='landing_page_version',
    baseline='original',
    covariates=['historical_conversion_rate', 'seasonal_index'],
    stratified_by='traffic_source',
    output_name='seasonally_adjusted_impact'
)

query: Apply pre/post methodology to evaluate site redesign impact on engagement metrics
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | PrePostChange(
    condition_column='site_version',
    baseline='old_design',
    covariates=['pre_launch_engagement', 'user_activity_level', 'tenure_days'],
    output_name='adjusted_redesign_impact'
)

query: Calculate change in average order value adjusted for historical purchasing patterns
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | PrePostChange(
    condition_column='price_display_variant',
    baseline='control',
    covariates=['historical_aov', 'purchase_frequency', 'customer_tier'],
    output_name='adjusted_aov_change'
)

query: Use pre/post analysis to measure retention improvement accounting for cohort effects
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | PrePostChange(
    condition_column='onboarding_experience',
    baseline='standard',
    covariates=['pre_change_retention', 'acquisition_source', 'first_month_activity'],
    stratified_by='user_segment',
    output_name='adjusted_retention_impact'
)

query: Focus analysis on high-traffic experiment conditions only
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | FilterConditions(
    conditions=['control', 'variant_a', 'variant_b'],
    output_name='main_variants_only'
)

query: Limit analysis to control and champion variants for final decision
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | FilterConditions(
    conditions=['control', 'champion'],
    output_name='final_comparison'
)

query: Filter experiment analysis to include only the mobile app variants
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | FilterConditions(
    conditions=['mobile_control', 'mobile_variant_1', 'mobile_variant_2'],
    output_name='mobile_variants_analysis'
)

query: Exclude low-traffic experiment variants from the final analysis
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | FilterConditions(
    conditions=['control', 'variant_a', 'variant_c'],
    output_name='high_traffic_variants'
)

query: Focus on comparing the best-performing variant against control
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | FilterConditions(
    conditions=['control', 'variant_b'],
    output_name='best_variant_comparison'
)

query: Determine required sample size to detect 5% conversion lift with 80% power
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | PowerAnalysis(
    condition_column='experiment_group',
    baseline='control',
    metric_column='conversion_rate',
    alpha=0.05,
    power=0.8,
    output_name='sample_size_requirements'
)

query: Calculate sample size needed to detect 10% improvement in click-through rate
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | PowerAnalysis(
    condition_column='variant',
    baseline='control',
    metric_column='ctr',
    alpha=0.05,
    power=0.9,
    output_name='ctr_experiment_size'
)

query: Run power analysis to detect 3% change in average order value at 85% power
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | PowerAnalysis(
    condition_column='price_test_group',
    baseline='control',
    metric_column='average_order_value',
    alpha=0.01,
    power=0.85,
    output_name='aov_test_power'
)

query: Determine minimum detectable effect with current sample size at 90% power
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | PowerAnalysis(
    condition_column='test_group',
    baseline='control',
    metric_column='retention_rate',
    alpha=0.05,
    power=0.9,
    output_name='min_detectable_effect'
)

query: Calculate power for detecting 7% revenue increase with current sample size
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | PowerAnalysis(
    condition_column='experiment_group',
    baseline='control',
    metric_column='revenue_per_user',
    alpha=0.05,
    output_name='revenue_test_power'
)

query: Create summary of experiment metrics stratified by user segment and device type
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | StratifiedSummary(
    condition_column='test_group',
    stratified_by=['user_segment', 'device_type'],
    metrics=['conversion_rate', 'average_order_value', 'engagement_score'],
    output_name='stratified_experiment_summary'
)

query: Generate stratified results of A/B test by acquisition source and user tenure
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | StratifiedSummary(
    condition_column='variant',
    stratified_by=['acquisition_source', 'tenure_bucket'],
    metrics=['conversion', 'revenue', 'retention'],
    output_name='test_results_by_segment'
)

query: Summarize retention test results broken down by subscription plan and country
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | StratifiedSummary(
    condition_column='test_variant',
    stratified_by=['subscription_plan', 'country'],
    metrics=['day7_retention', 'day30_retention', 'upgrade_rate'],
    output_name='retention_test_segments'
)

query: Create detailed breakdown of pricing test results by customer segment
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | StratifiedSummary(
    condition_column='price_test_group',
    stratified_by=['customer_segment', 'usage_tier'],
    metrics=['conversion_rate', 'cart_value', 'units_per_order'],
    output_name='pricing_test_segments'
)

query: Generate performance metrics for each experiment variant stratified by traffic source
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | StratifiedSummary(
    condition_column='experiment_variant',
    stratified_by='traffic_source',
    metrics=['bounce_rate', 'session_duration', 'pages_per_session', 'conversion_rate'],
    output_name='traffic_source_performance'
)

query: Calculate 95% confidence intervals for average revenue per user differences
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | BootstrapCI(
    condition_column='variant',
    baseline='control',
    metric_column='revenue_per_user',
    confidence=0.95,
    n_bootstraps=1000,
    stratified_by='user_tier',
    output_name='revenue_impact_confidence'
)

query: Generate 90% confidence intervals for conversion rate lift using bootstrap
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | BootstrapCI(
    condition_column='experiment_group',
    baseline='control',
    metric_column='conversion_rate',
    confidence=0.9,
    n_bootstraps=2000,
    output_name='conversion_lift_ci'
)

query: Use bootstrap method to calculate 99% confidence intervals for retention impact
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | BootstrapCI(
    condition_column='feature_flag',
    baseline='off',
    metric_column='retention_rate',
    confidence=0.99,
    n_bootstraps=5000,
    stratified_by='user_segment',
    output_name='retention_impact_ci'
)

query: Calculate 80% confidence bounds for difference in average session duration
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | BootstrapCI(
    condition_column='ui_version',
    baseline='original',
    metric_column='avg_session_duration',
    confidence=0.8,
    n_bootstraps=1000,
    output_name='session_duration_ci'
)

query: Use bootstrapping to determine 95% confidence interval for revenue impact by segment
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | BootstrapCI(
    condition_column='recommendation_algorithm',
    baseline='algorithm_a',
    metric_column='revenue_per_session',
    confidence=0.95,
    n_bootstraps=3000,
    stratified_by='customer_segment',
    output_name='algorithm_revenue_impact_ci'
)

query: Apply Bonferroni correction to p-values from multiple experiment metrics
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | MultiComparisonAdjustment(
    p_value_column='raw_p_value',
    method='bonferroni',
    output_name='adjusted_p_values'
)

query: Use Benjamini-Hochberg procedure to control false discovery rate in A/B test results
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | MultiComparisonAdjustment(
    p_value_column='p_value',
    method='fdr_bh',
    output_name='fdr_adjusted_pvalues'
)

query: Apply Holm-Bonferroni method to adjust p-values for multiple metrics
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | MultiComparisonAdjustment(
    p_value_column='original_pvalue',
    method='holm',
    output_name='holm_adjusted_pvalues'
)

query: Correct for multiple testing in feature impact analysis using Bonferroni method
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | MultiComparisonAdjustment(
    p_value_column='feature_pvalue',
    method='bonferroni',
    output_name='corrected_feature_pvalues'
)

query: Account for multiple testing in segment analysis using FDR correction
example:
ops_pipe = OperationsPipe.from_dataframe(data)
ops_pipe = ops_pipe | MultiComparisonAdjustment(
    p_value_column='segment_pvalue',
    method='fdr_bh',
    output_name='fdr_segment_pvalues'
)
